finding: The first backlog skill treated all bug/optimization records as ATM backlog entries and did not distinguish ATM framework bugs from adopter/project bugs.
expectedBehavior: The skill should route ATM product bugs to the ATM backlog and non-ATM project bugs to a repo-local project backlog.
evidenceOrRepro: User correction: "這個 skill 應該是要區別紀錄的是 ATM 的 bug 還是 其他專案的 bug".
followUp: Preserve the owner classification table in the skill and use `docs/governance/project-bug-and-optimization-backlog.md` for non-ATM repos.
